title: Warm up
content: The slide features illustrations of three cities: Beijing, Chongqing, and Hangzhou. Each image depicts a unique aspect of the city's environment. The slide sets the stage for exploring these cities.

title: An Evolving Nation
content: This slide highlights the dynamic changes occurring in China. It suggests a journey through significant cultural and economic hubs of the nation. Key imagery includes taxis and various cityscapes.

title: Session 1 Match the City Chain!
content: The session focuses on investigating and researching local features, development strategies, and their outcomes. It emphasizes the importance of understanding urban characteristics for strategic planning.

title: Match the city to its development strategy
content: The slide outlines specific development strategies tied to Beijing, Chongqing, and Hangzhou. It connects each city with respective strategic focuses.

title: Through the eyes of taxi drivers...
content: This slide views urban development through the perspective of taxi drivers, highlighting the major strategies of sustainable development, economic growth, and integration of tradition and technology. It reinforces the notion of varied development strategies based on local needs.
